import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/components/LanguageSwitcher.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LanguageSwitcher.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { Globe, Check } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { useLanguage } from "/src/app/contexts/LanguageContext.tsx";
const languages = [
  { code: "en", label: "English", nativeLabel: "English" },
  { code: "ar", label: "Arabic", nativeLabel: "العربية" }
];
export default function LanguageSwitcher() {
  _s();
  const { language, setLanguage } = useLanguage();
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  const dropdownRef = useRef(null);
  const currentLanguage = languages.find((lang) => lang.code === language) || languages[0];
  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(event) {
      if (dropdownRef.current && !dropdownRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        setIsOpen(false);
      }
    }
    if (isOpen) {
      document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    }
    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    };
  }, [isOpen]);
  const handleLanguageSelect = (langCode) => {
    setLanguage(langCode);
    setIsOpen(false);
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "stu0", _fgB: 1779104382773, _fgD: true, className: "relative", ref: dropdownRef, "data-fg-stu0": "758.3469:758.2975:/src/app/components/LanguageSwitcher.tsx:45:5:1238:1729:e:div:etx:1", children: [

_s(LanguageSwitcher, "GD+hP6PMNyKS+TFYXNlUSYLuDlk=", false, function() {

_c = LanguageSwitcher;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "LanguageSwitcher");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LanguageSwitcher.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/LanguageSwitcher.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
